homepage.heroSubline: Reliable solutions for drain and main issues. Serving San Jose and the surrounding Bay Area.
homepage.aboutTitle: Your Trusted San Jose Plumbing Partner
aboutText: San Jose Drain and Main started with a simple mission: to provide honest, reliable plumbing services to our neighbors. We're a local team, born and raised right here in the South Bay, and we understand the unique challenges our community faces.

We believe in doing the job right the first time. Our approach combines time-tested techniques with the latest technology to ensure lasting solutions. We prioritize clear communication, transparent pricing, and a commitment to exceeding your expectations.

We're more than just plumbers; we're members of this community. We actively support local schools and organizations, and we're dedicated to providing exceptional service that keeps San Jose running smoothly. When you choose us, you're supporting a local business that cares.

valueProps.title: Fast Response Times
valueProps.description: We understand plumbing emergencies don't wait. Expect prompt, reliable service when you need it most.

valueProps.title: Upfront Pricing
valueProps.description: No hidden fees or surprises. We provide clear, detailed estimates before any work begins.

valueProps.title: Experienced Technicians
valueProps.description: Our team of licensed plumbers has years of experience tackling even the toughest plumbing challenges in older and newer homes.

valueProps.title: Guaranteed Satisfaction
valueProps.description: We stand behind our work. If you're not completely satisfied, we'll make it right.

homepage.ctaSubline: Call us today for fast, reliable service in San Jose and surrounding areas.

services.name: Drain Cleaning
services.shortDescription: Fast and effective drain cleaning services for any clog.
services.description:
Clogged drains are a common problem in San Jose homes, especially with the older infrastructure in neighborhoods like Willow Glen. Our drain cleaning services utilize advanced techniques like snaking and hydro jetting to completely clear blockages and restore proper flow. We handle everything from minor sink clogs to major sewer line backups. We also offer preventative maintenance plans to keep your drains flowing freely and prevent future issues. Given the hard water common in the Bay Area, mineral buildup can be a significant contributor to drain problems; we address this directly. Regular drain cleaning can prevent costly repairs down the line, especially in older homes with aging pipes.

We'll diagnose the cause of your drain problem using camera inspections to identify the source and extent of the blockage. Whether it's hair, grease, or tree roots, we have the tools and expertise to resolve it efficiently. We ensure minimal disruption to your home and leave the work area clean.

Our team is equipped to handle any drain cleaning need, from simple clogs to complex sewer line issues. We understand the urgency of drain problems and offer prompt, reliable service to get your plumbing back in working order.
process: Inspection: Determine the cause and location of the clog.
Cleaning: Utilize snaking or hydro jetting to remove the blockage.
Verification: Confirm clear flow with camera inspection.
Prevention: Offer tips and maintenance plans to prevent future clogs.

faq.question: How often should I have my drains cleaned?
faq.answer: We recommend professional drain cleaning at least once a year, or more frequently if you experience recurring clogs or slow drainage.

faq.question: What is hydro jetting?
faq.answer: Hydro jetting uses high-pressure water to blast away stubborn blockages and buildup from your drain pipes, providing a more thorough cleaning than traditional snaking.

faq.question: Is drain cleaning messy?
faq.answer: Our technicians take precautions to minimize mess and protect your property during drain cleaning services. We'll clean up the work area thoroughly after the job is complete.

services.name: Water Heater Services
services.shortDescription: Expert installation, repair, and maintenance for all types of water heaters.
services.description:
Given San Jose's mild climate, a reliable water heater is essential for comfortable living. We offer comprehensive water heater services, including installation, repair, and maintenance for both traditional tank and tankless models. We understand the nuances of different water heater brands and can recommend the best solution for your home and budget. We work with gas, electric, and propane water heaters, ensuring your hot water needs are met efficiently and safely. Our technicians are trained to handle any water heater issue, from leaks and temperature fluctuations to complete system failures.

We also specialize in tankless water heater installations, which are becoming increasingly popular in newer San Jose developments due to their energy efficiency and space-saving design. We can help you determine if a tankless water heater is right for your home and provide expert installation services. Regular maintenance is crucial for extending the life of your water heater and preventing costly repairs. We offer comprehensive maintenance plans to keep your water heater running smoothly and efficiently.

We prioritize safety and efficiency in all our water heater services. Our technicians are licensed and insured, and we adhere to all local codes and regulations. We'll ensure your water heater is installed and maintained to the highest standards.
process: Assessment: Evaluate your hot water needs and existing system.
Selection: Recommend the best water heater option for your home.
Installation: Expert installation according to manufacturer specifications.
Testing: Verify proper operation and safety.

faq.question: How long does a water heater typically last?
faq.answer: Traditional tank water heaters typically last 8-12 years, while tankless water heaters can last 20 years or more with proper maintenance.

faq.question: What are the benefits of a tankless water heater?
faq.answer: Tankless water heaters provide on-demand hot water, eliminating the need for a storage tank. They are more energy-efficient and can save you money on your utility bills.

faq.question: How do I know if my water heater needs to be replaced?
faq.answer: Signs that your water heater may need to be replaced include leaks, rust, strange noises, and inconsistent water temperature.

services.name: Leak Detection
services.shortDescription: Accurate leak detection services to prevent water damage.
services.description:
Hidden leaks can cause significant damage to your San Jose home, especially with the region's susceptibility to earthquakes that can compromise pipe integrity. Our leak detection services utilize advanced technology to pinpoint the source of leaks, even those hidden behind walls or under floors. We use non-invasive methods to minimize disruption to your property. Early leak detection can prevent costly repairs related to water damage, mold growth, and structural issues. We understand the urgency of leak detection and offer prompt, reliable service to protect your home.

We use acoustic listening devices, thermal imaging, and other advanced tools to detect leaks with precision. Our technicians are trained to identify even the smallest leaks and provide accurate assessments of the damage. We provide detailed reports and recommendations for repair.

We work with homeowners, property managers, and insurance companies to resolve leak issues quickly and efficiently. We're committed to providing accurate leak detection services that protect your home and save you money.
process: Inspection: Thorough inspection of your plumbing system.
Detection: Utilize advanced technology to locate leaks.
Assessment: Evaluate the extent of the damage.
Reporting: Provide a detailed report and recommendations.

faq.question: How do I know if I have a hidden leak?
faq.answer: Signs of a hidden leak include unexplained increases in your water bill, water stains on walls or ceilings, and the sound of running water when no fixtures are in use.

faq.question: What is the cost of leak detection?
faq.answer: The cost of leak detection varies depending on the complexity of the job. Contact us for a free estimate.

faq.question: How quickly can you detect a leak?
faq.answer: We can typically schedule a leak detection appointment within 24-48 hours.

services.name: Pipe Repair & Replacement
services.shortDescription: Reliable pipe repair and replacement services for all types of pipes.
services.description:
Aging pipes are a common issue in San Jose's established neighborhoods like Rose Garden and Willow Glen. We offer comprehensive pipe repair and replacement services to address leaks, corrosion, and other pipe-related problems. We work with all types of pipes, including copper, PVC, and PEX. Our technicians are trained to assess the condition of your pipes and recommend the best solution for your needs. We use trenchless pipe repair methods whenever possible to minimize disruption to your property. Proper pipe repair and replacement can prevent water damage, improve water quality, and extend the life of your plumbing system.

We provide expert pipe repair and replacement services for both residential and commercial properties. We understand the importance of a sound plumbing system and are committed to providing reliable solutions that meet your needs and budget. We ensure minimal disruption to your property during pipe repair and replacement projects.

Our team is equipped to handle any pipe repair or replacement need, from minor leaks to complete system overhauls. We understand the urgency of pipe problems and offer prompt, reliable service to get your plumbing back in working order.
process: Inspection: Assess the condition of your pipes.
Repair/Replacement: Repair or replace damaged pipes using appropriate methods.
Testing: Verify proper function and leak-free connections.
Restoration: Restore the work area to its original condition.

faq.question: How do I know if my pipes need to be replaced?
faq.answer: Signs that your pipes may need to be replaced include frequent leaks, low water pressure, and discolored water.

faq.question: What is trenchless pipe repair?
faq.answer: Trenchless pipe repair methods allow us to repair or replace pipes without digging extensive trenches, minimizing disruption to your property.

faq.question: How long does pipe repair or replacement take?
faq.answer: The duration of pipe repair or replacement depends on the complexity of the job. We'll provide a detailed timeline before starting any work.

services.name: Sewer Line Services
services.shortDescription: Expert sewer line repair, replacement, and cleaning services.
services.description:
Sewer line problems can be a major headache for San Jose homeowners. We offer comprehensive sewer line services, including repair, replacement, and cleaning. We use advanced technology to diagnose and resolve sewer line issues quickly and efficiently. We understand the urgency of sewer line problems and offer 24/7 emergency service. We can handle everything from minor clogs to complete sewer line replacements. Given the older housing stock in areas like Japantown, sewer line maintenance is crucial.

Our sewer line services include video inspection, trenchless repair, and traditional excavation. We'll assess the condition of your sewer line and recommend the best solution for your needs. We use high-quality materials and workmanship to ensure lasting results. We prioritize minimizing disruption to your property during sewer line projects.

We work with homeowners, businesses, and municipalities to provide reliable sewer line services. We're committed to protecting the environment and complying with all local regulations.
process: Inspection: Video inspection to assess the condition of the sewer line.
Cleaning: Remove blockages and debris from the sewer line.
Repair/Replacement: Repair or replace damaged sections of the sewer line.
Verification: Verify proper function and flow.

faq.question: How do I know if my sewer line is clogged?
faq.answer: Signs of a clogged sewer line include slow drains, gurgling sounds in your plumbing, and sewage backups.

faq.question: What is trenchless sewer line repair?
faq.answer: Trenchless sewer line repair methods allow us to repair or replace sewer lines without digging extensive trenches, minimizing disruption to your property.

faq.question: How often should I have my sewer line inspected?
faq.answer: We recommend having your sewer line inspected every 1-2 years, especially if you live in an older home.

services.name: Fixture Installation
services.shortDescription: Professional installation of faucets, toilets, sinks, and other plumbing fixtures.
services.description:
Upgrading your plumbing fixtures can enhance the look and functionality of your San Jose home. We offer professional fixture installation services for faucets, toilets, sinks, showers, and more. We work with all major brands and can help you choose the right fixtures for your style and budget. Proper fixture installation ensures leak-free performance and extends the life of your plumbing system. We can handle everything from simple faucet replacements to complete bathroom renovations. Many homeowners in Almaden Valley are upgrading to low-flow fixtures for water conservation.

Our fixture installation services include removal of old fixtures, installation of new fixtures, and connection to existing plumbing lines. We ensure all connections are tight and leak-free. We provide expert advice on fixture selection and maintenance. We prioritize customer satisfaction and provide clean, professional service.

We work with homeowners, contractors, and designers to provide reliable fixture installation services. We're committed to providing high-quality workmanship and exceeding your expectations.
process: Selection: Assist with selecting the right fixtures for your needs.
Removal: Remove old fixtures carefully.
Installation: Install new fixtures according to manufacturer specifications.
Testing: Verify proper function and leak-free connections.

faq.question: How long does fixture installation take?
faq.answer: The duration of fixture installation depends on the type of fixture and the complexity of the job. We'll provide a detailed timeline before starting any work.

faq.question: Do you offer a warranty on your fixture installation services?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer a warranty on our fixture installation services to ensure your satisfaction.

faq.question: Can you help me choose the right fixtures for my home?
faq.answer: Yes, we can provide expert advice on fixture selection based on your style, budget, and water conservation goals.

As the heart of Silicon Valley, San Jose demands reliable and efficient plumbing solutions to keep pace with its dynamic growth and technological advancements. Our team of experienced plumbers is equipped to handle any plumbing issue, big or small. reviews.name: Maria S.
reviews.text: I had a severely clogged kitchen sink, and San Jose Drain and Main came to my rescue! The technician, David, was incredibly knowledgeable and friendly. He quickly diagnosed the problem and used a hydro jet to clear the blockage. My sink is now draining perfectly. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: John B.
reviews.text: My water heater stopped working on a cold night. San Jose Drain and Main responded quickly and had a technician out within a few hours. He was able to diagnose and repair the issue efficiently. The price was reasonable, and I appreciate their prompt service.

reviews.name: Lisa K.
reviews.text: I suspected I had a hidden leak, and San Jose Drain and Main confirmed it. They used advanced equipment to pinpoint the exact location of the leak behind a wall. They provided a detailed report for my insurance company, and their quick action prevented further damage. Thank you!

reviews.name: Robert P.
reviews.text: I had several corroded pipes that needed to be replaced. San Jose Drain and Main provided a competitive quote and completed the job efficiently. The technicians were professional and cleaned up after themselves. I'm very happy with the quality of their work.

reviews.name: Susan L.
reviews.text: Our sewer line was backing up, causing a major mess. San Jose Drain and Main came out and cleared the blockage quickly. They were professional and courteous, and the price was fair. I would definitely use them again.

reviews.name: Michael T.
reviews.text: San Jose Drain and Main installed a new toilet and sink in my bathroom. The installation was flawless, and the fixtures look great. The technician was very knowledgeable and provided helpful advice. I highly recommend their services.
